title: Pi TUI polish — journal widget, phase parsing, auto-start, skill metadata, RL tools
summary: Full Pi TUI cleanup session: removed journal widget + nudge, fixed phase backtick parsing, silenced MAP SSE noise, added auto-start message on session_start, fixed 3 skill frontmatter issues, cherry-picked 4 RL tool extensions from stale PR #17 into clean PR #32, closed #17.
detail: PRs opened: #27 (merged): quiet journal, fix phase, auto-start, skill metadata. #32 (open): cherry-picked RL tools from PR #17. #33 (open): remove journal widget, hide Phase:unknown. Closed #17 (superseded by #32). Key fixes: journal widget removed, nudge removed, phase regex fixed, MAP SSE silenced, auto_start config added, skill frontmatter fixed. Discovery: root build doesn't rebuild packages/pi.
learned: Root npm run build does NOT rebuild packages/pi
Pi dist/ is gitignored — stale .js files persist across branches
PR #17 had source files only on branch but dist artifacts lingered locally
next: Merge PRs #32 and #33. Test auto-start in real Pi sessions.
